items.title: Hamilton claims spectacular first Ferrari win in Barcelona
items.summary: Lewis Hamilton claimed his first race victory for Ferrari after a strategy gamble at the Barcelona-Catalunya Grand Prix as championship leader Kimi Antonelli dramatically retired late on.

items.title: Rock pins INCREDIBLE 144 to clinch stunning deciding leg victory over Latvia
items.summary: Josh Rock checked out of 144 to clinch an 8-7 victory for Northern Ireland against Latvia in the quarter-finals of the World Cup of Darts.

items.title: Meet the German Jamie Vardy who worked gruelling hours in a factory before fairytale World Cup call-up
items.summary: GERMANY have rocked up to the World Cup with their very own Jamie Vardy - and he might just be their secret weapon. items.title: England’s ‘most patriotic estate’ gets kitted out with hundreds of metres of flags ahead of first World Cup match
items.summary: A UK estate has once again claimed to be Britain's "most patriotic" in the run up for England's first World Cup match next week.
